name: Ieva Smidt
subject: almost there…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
| New Hampshire Primary In:
---
[ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22gKnXh7UE4jTmjqnxowCxucNgJ8MwX8sXwELGNRzP-W10f_w4iY7ND10lycct1bT4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200206_frs&n=1)
Team — here’s the deal: Last night, Bill emailed you that we had a gap of about $9,088.49 towards our goal for having the resources we need to send Trump’s campaign into a tailspin in New Hampshire. **_And since then you have cut that gap in half._**
Now we need your help to put this goal away for good. We still have to raise another **$4,310.52 before midnight** tonight if we’re going to have everything we need to keep our boots on the ground and our ads running.
We can not afford to fall short here. Not this close to primary day. **_Not with so much at stake._**
[**Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help us close the gap before midnight?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22gKnXh7UE4jTmjqnxowCxucNgJ8MwX8sXwELGNRzP-W10f_w4iY7ND10lycct1bT4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200206_frs&n=2)
| [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22gKnXh7UE4jTmjqnxowCxucNgJ8MwX8sXwELGNRzP-W10f_w4iY7ND10lycct1bT4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200206_frs&n=3)
---
Thanks,
Ieva

name: Laura, Marshall (2)
subject: FWD: Did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Hey Team -

Just emailing to make sure you had a chance to look at Laura's message.

We still need 14 more people in 34223 to tell us about their voting plans so that we can put together our election strategy. Republicans are going all out to implement the Trump agenda nationwide - but we're depending on grassroots Democrats like you to help stop them in their tracks.

We're counting on a response from you, Team. Please let us know by midnight tonight:
| | **Will you vote in the 2020 elections?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY5MjU1MTcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM5NjQwMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

---
Thanks so much for your input,

Marshall Cohen
DGA Political Director

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Laura** <info@dga.net>
Subject: 39 responses short from 34223
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

**Team - across the country Republicans are destroying our democracy and putting our future at risk. **
They're sending thoughts and prayers instead of acting to prevent gun violence. They're rolling back environmental protections and accelerating climate catastrophe. And they keep trying to strip health care from MILLIONS.
But here's how we stop them: We combat their ultraconservative agenda at EVERY level - locally, statewide and nationally - by electing Democrats who will fight for our values. To do that, we need to make sure EVERY Democratic voter turns out on Election Day. **But right now we 're 39 responses short from 34223 to reach statistical significance for our voter turnout survey, and we need your help - ****Tell us now:**
| | **Will you vote in 2020?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY5MjU1MTcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM5NjQwMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---
Thank you for your response,

Laura Carlson
DGA Digital Director

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Senator Doug Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Now more than ever, we need people in the Senate who will stand up and fight for what's right.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890439/7f51f7bc/4d0eb537/4ef05fcd/1158333688/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | I'll make this quick, Peter: I'm writing to ask you to **[split a donation between Senator Doug Jones' reelection campaign in Alabama and my campaign to defeat Senator Cornyn here in Texas.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890439/7f51f7bc/4d0eb537/4ef05fcc/1158333688/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-jones?refcode=email_20200206.4nd__885__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

When Sen. Jones put country over politics, he took a courageous step. Now more than ever, we need people in the Senate who are willing to stand up and fight for what's right -- so we need to have Sen. Jones' back this November in a tough election.

Conversely, Sen. Cornyn put his lack of integrity on display once again this week. By voting under the direction of Mitch McConnell to acquit the president without calling for witnesses, he showed us that he's more interested in political expediency than upholding his oath to our Constitution.

We need lawmakers in D.C. who act with honesty and integrity more than ever.

**Peter, will you split a donation between my campaign and Sen. Jones ' today to help us bring some backbone to Washington?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between both candidates:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890439/7f51f7bc/4d0eb537/4ef05fc3/1158333688/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-jones?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200206.4nd__885__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890439/7f51f7bc/4d0eb537/4ef05fc1/1158333688/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-jones?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200206.4nd__885__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890439/7f51f7bc/4d0eb537/4ef05fc0/1158333688/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-jones?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200206.4nd__885__&amount=50")**

Thanks for your support,

MJ

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: We've always been a team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
Friend, My twin brother Joaquin and I have always been a team. We were raised together on the West side of San Antonio by our mother Rosie, someone who worked tirelessly to make progress in her commun | | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, My twin brother Joaquin and I have always been a team. We were raised together on the West side of San Antonio by our mother Rosie, someone who worked tirelessly to make progress in her community. She taught us that if you want to make a change, you don't wait-- you work. You make your future happen. And that's what we did. My brother and I went off to college together, to law school together, and into the professional world together--before deciding to go into public service in the community we grew up in. **[Help him keep up his fight in Congress>>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacde/2180850905/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_julian20?refcode=jc_em_fr_juliansend&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Help+him+keep+up+his+fight+in+Congress+g&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM")** I first ran for elected office in 2001 - when I was elected to the San Antonio City Council at 26 years old. Joaquin served as my campaign treasurer and worked tirelessly to help me pull off an upset victory. The next year, I helped get my brother elected to the Texas House of Representatives. My brother went on to be elected to Congress, serving the district our grandmother immigrated to almost 100 years before--and I had the honor of serving in President Obama's cabinet. I couldn't be prouder of the amazing work that my brother has done in Congress. As Chairman of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, he fights everyday against the cruelty of the Trump administration's inhumane immigration policy and has done critical work on the Intelligence Committee helping to oversee the impeachment hearings. I hope you'll join me in supporting my brother's campaign for re-election to Congress. **[Chip in $25 right now to help get Joaquin re-elected>>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacdd/2180850905/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_julian20?refcode=jc_em_fr_juliansend&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+25+right+now+to+help+get+Joaquin&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM")** When I ended my run for president, I promised to continue fighting to make progress in our country. That is why I have spent the past month campaigning across the country for candidates that share these same values. I know that my brother will continue to fight to put **the people** of the 20th district first, and I'm so proud to have his back. **[I hope you will too>>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacdc/2180850905/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_julian20?refcode=jc_em_fr_juliansend&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+I+hope+you+will+too+gtgt&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM")** Thank you, Julian
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacdb/2180850905/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacda/2180850905/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacd9/2180850905/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
We know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacd8/2180850905/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc91f/3eb3e2fc/6a209cee/744eacc7/2180850905/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20200206EM&source=20200206EM"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Doug Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, during the final votes in President Trump's impeachment trial, every Senate Democrat stood strong and voted to convict and remove the President from office.
That includes my friend and colleague Doug Jones, a red-state Democrat from Alabama, who faced pressure from Republicans to join them and acquit President Trump. But he chose the truth instead, and now the GOP is hoping to make him pay the price for it in November.
**[Peter, we need to stand with Doug Jones today. Let's show him our support for his courageous vote and help him defend his seat. Pitch in $5 right now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-doug-jones?refcode=em200206i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Yesterday's vote proved just how important it is for us to work hard and re-elect our most vulnerable Democratic Senators like Doug Jones. Republicans think Doug will be easy to beat in the November election, but they don't know he'll have all of us standing behind him.
If you're ready to send the GOP the message that we're standing with Doug Jones, join me:
**[Make a $5 contribution right now to show your support for my friend Doug Jones.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-doug-jones?refcode=em200206i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-doug-jones?refcode=em200206i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Team Yang
subject: Outspent in the Granite State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We need to peak here

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7171%2E377263%2E3ldTVd) Yang Gang --

We’re being outspent in New Hampshire. To be straight with you, we need to catch up -- and fast.

Since the Iowa caucuses, all the top candidates in the race have doubled down on their ad spending in New Hampshire. You can’t go anywhere here without seeing an ad for Bernie, Buttigieg, or Biden.

**[We know our message works -- we know that if enough New Hampshire voters see our ads, we can break through and peak at the right time. But we can’t do it without your help. Chip in right now to put us over the edge to get the ad time Andrew needs.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24788?t=5&akid=7171%2E377263%2E3ldTVd)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24788?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7171%2E377263%2E3ldTVd)

Last night’s CNN Town Hall was just the start -- our momentum is undeniable. Next, Andrew’s going to crush it at tomorrow night’s New Hampshire debate.

When that happens, we need to be prepared to go big on an ad buy that will be seen by every single New Hampshire voter.

**[We need the Yang Gang by our side, especially with such little time to go before voting begins. So stand by us, Yang Gang. Make a contribution right now so we can get our ads up on the air in New Hampshire.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24788?t=12&akid=7171%2E377263%2E3ldTVd)**

Thanks for stepping up,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24788?t=13&akid=7171%2E377263%2E3ldTVd)

Earlier this week we announced that our team needs to raise $2 million to fund critical organizing and advertising efforts before the New Hampshire primary next week.

And today we need your support to stay on track toward hitting that goal.

If 63 people from Pennsylvania chip in $23 (our average contribution) now, we'll stay on track to hit this important goal. But not everyone reading this will donate. That's why we're relying on you.

>
This is going to be a long, competitive race, but Elizabeth Warren is never going to lose sight of what's important in this election: fighting for working families and making the case for big, structural change.

Our team is going to continue to work our hearts out to inspire as many people as possible to vote for her next Tuesday. That means knocking on doors, making calls, buying ads, hosting events, and getting Elizabeth's message out there -- and the money we raise to hit this goal will fund all that work before the primary.

**But we can't fall short of this goal. We can't afford to cut back our momentum now. Others have PACs to help bail them out. Elizabeth Warren only has grassroots supporters. Can she count on you?**

**[Chip in $2 or whatever you can and be one of the 63 supporters from Pennsylvania we're relying on to donate today to hit this goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852adaf/45c30650/1fb84c479/66e27185/4293630178/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8yM0ZfRUdMX01DR19DXzIwMjAwMjA2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO23F_EGL_MCG_C_20200206_V1S3_P")**

Team Warren

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: LISTEN: We are on air across OK-5
body:
We're calling out the Democrats' radicalism | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/acc246fb94e7/calling-all-patriots-12167765?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=55932547a4&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [LISTEN NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=db226f644b&e=795c6d9796 "LISTEN NOW")
---
| Peter, We are officially on the air!

**[I wanted to make sure you saw our VERY FIRST radio ad that we are playing across the district.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=df32ce11cf&e=795c6d9796)** In it, we call out Kendra Horn and the Democrats' extremism on everything from open borders to this partisan impeachment sham.

We have an opportunity right now that we are not letting go to waste. Kendra Horn has shown her true colors as just another Pelosi rubber-stamp by voting for impeachment and we can flip this district in 2020 if we elect the right Republican nominee.

We need a tested fighter who has a record of standing up to the liberal establishment. That's me, and it's why I'm working hard to earn every single vote I can.
---
| | | | | | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cfd20857b5&e=795c6d9796) | [Share](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d64183dfc3&e=795c6d9796)
---|---
| | [](http://us20.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=af8298a077&e=795c6d9796) | [Forward](http://us20.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=af8298a077&e=795c6d9796)
---|---
| Campaigns take resources though, and running ads is one of the most expensive things campaigns do. [**Will you donate just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 to help keep this ad on air and expose Kendra Horn as just another Pelosi rubber-stamp?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=67507c44ad&e=795c6d9796)

[**Then please make sure to share the ad with your friends on Facebook to make sure as many people see it as possible.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=960690d5fa&e=795c6d9796) With your help we WILL flip Oklahoma's 5th district red again and give conservatives and President Trump a strong ally in Congress. Thank you.

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ea5b2f6dff&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

subject: quick & urgent request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team - we know it's late so we'll keep this short!

[We've only got a few days until the most important day of this campaign so far - the New Hampshire primary.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaae2/134673f2/37d0d90b/699739ff/4187896160/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B4_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

After the chaos in Iowa, polls show that a majority of Democrats are still undecided in the Granite State.

[We've got to raise another $100,000 by Tuesday to fund our final turnout push, and we can't do it without your help, team.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaae2/134673f2/37d0d90b/699739ff/4187896160/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B4_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Before you head out for the evening, can you rush a donation of $5 - or whatever you can? name: Unite the Country
subject: Joe Biden can heal this country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
Did you catch last night's CNN Town Hall in New Hampshire with Joe Biden? It was one of Joe's best performances yet.
One of the standout moments was when an audience member asked Joe what advice he would give to someone who is struggling to overcome a stutter. While Joe shared his story, he talked about empathy and healing, and how we need to reach out to help each other as Americans.

Joe knows that to unite this country, we need to reach out to each other more, because we aren't doing it enough. Throughout his career, Joe has helped people heal and overcome their struggles. Joe's compassion and humility are endearing and a complete contrast to the bully who currently occupies the Oval Office.

**Watch our new digital ad called "Empathy," which features some of Joe's heartfelt response from last night's CNN Town Hall, and then share it with your friends and family on Facebook and Twitter.**

[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fef/64260219/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/iLbzULGV04")
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fe8/64260219/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/492596864963684/")** **[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fef/64260219/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/iLbzULGV04")**
During Joe's response, social media was flooded with comments about Joe Biden's compassion -- and how he is a stark contrast from Donald Trump. Tweet after tweet talked about Joe's extraordinary character and his deep empathy for people and their struggles.
Joe Biden is the leader we need to restore integrity to the White House. He will unite the country and heal our nation. He will always do the right thing to help others, and America deserves a leader like him.
Onward,
Unite the Country
**[WATCH THE AD](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fe8/64260219/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/492596864963684/")**

[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fe9/64260219/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fea/64260219/VEsA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766feb/64260219/VEsB/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.instagram.com/unitethecountry/")
* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fd4/64260219/VEsO/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We're counting on supporters like you, but if you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76d2/287b9173/2b05c8ab/7e766fd5/64260219/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

| Hello!
[I would love to see you at Kamp's in a couple of weeks!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NYjjPPWozvrwYs2X9XMnH3nfRodMdwNspytgh8_VqxoQQmukOnkgTq5BuSLirq_cp6VDDxKaGfFZUsDUenDDKVWmEgW1fXBiTwEd7ps9kkNOrSWCR2gpFbzNXa3tpQKYUbzcNBCKgGgTBk6UArJBBe0P-gfnEbTG&c=GcgjmWys5yA_BGtjSHaIqg28yV7FIMh-JAubMV7FZAGOB0cE4PMUdw==&ch=CBxyayMR0Om4wsAa_S36Bst5_daFTI24C_hMdT5-CN4FudZq4vT7EA==) We've had some amazing conversations at these events so far and I'm excited to keep the momentum.

name: Mike Siegel
subject: We've built the coalition — now let's win!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14739783/154867326/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U0YzUyYy1iYzQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPwQQgAnqHPtcULQY_zaK-5YFztCNCtHkidAFH-6bRk=&emci=c6e4c52c-bc49-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c7e4c52c-bc49-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

**Our key to success is big organizing.** To defeat a Republican like McCaul, who has $300m in personal wealth, organizing is the only path to victory. McCaul can buy TV ads and hire fancy consultants, but if we have the people—specifically, if we have the capacity to make hundreds of thousands of voter contacts—we will win.

And we are on our way. Over the last year, this campaign has earned the support of EVERY LOCAL ORGANIZATION that is involved in the Texas 10th primary election. And add to that a list of state and national organizations who have committed to winning in Texas 10.

[**Will you join our growing support and chip in to help us hit our goals?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14739784/154867327/203122784?refcode=em020620&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U0YzUyYy1iYzQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPwQQgAnqHPtcULQY_zaK-5YFztCNCtHkidAFH-6bRk=)
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14739785/154867328/203122784?refcode=em020620&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U0YzUyYy1iYzQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPwQQgAnqHPtcULQY_zaK-5YFztCNCtHkidAFH-6bRk=)**
Our job now is to work with each of these organizations to maximize our collective reach. We have less than four weeks until Election Day on March 3! **But for this one moment, let’s appreciate the broad movement we are building, with support from:**
* **Local Democratic Clubs from Austin and Houston,** including Northeast Travis County Democrats, Pflugerville Democrats, Wooten Democrats, NXNW Democrats, Central Austin Democrats, Capital Area Progressive Democrats, Liberal Austin Democrats, West Austin Democrats, and Area 5 Democrats;
* **Key Organizations Advocating for Black and Latino Voters,** including Jolt Action and Black Austin Democrats;
* **Local and National Environmental Organizations,** including Clean Water Action, 350 Action, the Sunrise Movement and Sunrise ATX, and Austin Environmental Democrats;
* **Youth Organizations,** including University Democrats and Austin Young Democrats;
* **National Progressive Organizations, **including Our Revolution, the Progressive Change Campaign Committee, the Working Families Party, Blue Action, Brand New Congress, and Progressive Democrats of America;
* **Major Equality Organizations,** including Stonewall Democrats of Austin and the Houston GLBT Caucus;
* **Disability Rights Organizations,** including Texas Democrats with Disabilities; and
* **Local and National Labor Organizations,** including the AFL-CIO, International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, National Union of Healthcare Workers, Communication Workers of America, AFSCME, the Austin Central Labor Council, and the Texas Gulf Coast Area Labor Federation.

Our work is not done, but we are proud of how broad and intersectional this campaign has become. Onward to victory!
Mike Siegel
* * *

But for this one moment, let’s appreciate the broad movement we are building, with support from: Local Democratic Clubs from Austin and Houston, including Northeast Travis County Democrats, Pflugerville Democrats, Wooten Democrats, NXNW Democrats, Central Austin Democrats, Capital Area Progressive Democrats, Liberal Austin Democrats, West Austin Democrats, and Area 5 Democrats; Key Organizations Advocating for Black and Latino Voters, including Jolt Action and Black Austin Democrats; Local and National Environmental Organizations, including Clean Water Action, 350 Action, the Sunrise Movement and Sunrise ATX, and Austin Environmental Democrats; Youth Organizations, including University Democrats and Austin Young Democrats; National Progressive Organizations, including Our Revolution, the Progressive Change Campaign Committee, the Working Families Party, Blue Action, Brand New Congress, and Progressive Democrats of America; Major Equality Organizations, including Stonewall Democrats of Austin and the Houston GLBT Caucus; Disability Rights Organizations, including Texas Democrats with Disabilities; and Local and National Labor Organizations, including the AFL-CIO, International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, National Union of Healthcare Workers, Communication Workers of America, AFSCME, the Austin Central Labor Council, and the Texas Gulf Coast Area Labor Federation. Our work is not done, but we are proud of how broad and intersectional this campaign has become. Onward to victory! Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Francys Johnson
subject: One Month Is Not Enough
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporate donations
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14740113/154871066/664205141?refcode=em020520-header&refcode2=7df21b56-bd49-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGYyMWI1Ni1iZDQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOApogq3RLtBTQpYRVp1rS0CugqWp9n-eh13uZwKG0c=) **** | | Hello friends,

As we recognize Black History Month, I hope you will give me a moment to explain what’s at stake in this election, and why I believe that winning Teresa’s race for the United States Senate in Georgia is the next step toward achieving a fuller measure of social and civic equality that is America’s promise.

My name is Francys Johnson. **Very early on in my life, I realized that law is a crucial path to make the changes that our country so desperately needs.** Growing up as a young Black man in the deep South, there weren’t that many people in the legal field who looked like me or grew up in communities like mine.

But through hard work, the support of my family, my faith, and those who believed in me, I would go on to become the president of the Georgia NAACP. I learned a lot from the leaders of the Civil Rights Movement, and one of those lessons is that we don’t make progress and shatter barriers alone. Our NAACP leadership sought to build bridges with younger activists from the Black Lives Matter movement and **keep the doors of opportunity open for those who follow in our footsteps.**

I’ve had up close and personal experience overseeing the NAACP’s public policy agenda and voter defense litigation as the Southeast Regional Director in so-called “red” and “purple” states – Georgia, Alabama, Florida, Mississippi, North Carolina, South Carolina, and Tennessee. I know what it will take for Georgia’s next U.S. Senator to deliver not only for her constituents **but for the cause of racial and social justice across the South.**

I’ve seen Teresa Tomlinson in action as mayor of Columbus. She has been fearless in addressing tough issues like race, inequity, and injustice because of her faith in government with good public stewardship at its helm. That is precisely the prescription to cure our societal ills at a time of unprecedented corruption, mistrust, and social division.

As a practicing attorney, theologian, and educator, I have studied these issues from every angle. **Barriers remain that must be dismantled and our fundamental rights, like accessing reproductive care and accessing the ballot box, are being taken away from us.**

Black history IS American history. And it is because of our rich history and the struggles of the generations before us that I refuse to sit on the sidelines as our rights are eroded and the voices of our communities silenced.

When I read the news today, I see hundreds of thousands of people being struck from the voter rolls, a two-tiered criminal justice system, and a government that can be bought and paid for by corporate donations. I see the same challenges that those before me have worked to overcome — A. Philip Randolph and Martin Luther King Jr., Andrew Young and Henry Aaron, and the many bright young activists who are doing the work now to invite everyone to participate fully in our democracy and hold our leaders accountable.

**From the courts to Congress, progress depends on what WE do in Georgia.** I have complete faith that Teresa will work tirelessly to address the inequities in our country and be a leader who will open the doors of opportunities for women, people of color, and women of color who just need that one opportunity to change the world.

**[In that spirit, will you join me by making a contribution to Teresa’s campaign today? Every single donation is an investment in a brighter and more hopeful future, not only for us but for future generations:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14740114/154871067/664205141?refcode=em020720&noskip=true&refcode2=7df21b56-bd49-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGYyMWI1Ni1iZDQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOApogq3RLtBTQpYRVp1rS0CugqWp9n-eh13uZwKG0c=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14740115/154871068/664205141?refcode=em020720&noskip=true&refcode2=7df21b56-bd49-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGYyMWI1Ni1iZDQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOApogq3RLtBTQpYRVp1rS0CugqWp9n-eh13uZwKG0c=)

name: Team Lipinski
subject: Quick update from the field
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

There’s less than six weeks until the election and Dan’s campaign is gaining momentum each and every day across the communities of IL-03. In addition to endorsements from mayors and village presidents covering all corners of the district, the campaign has received crucial support from the labor movement in recent weeks. Dan’s plans to lower healthcare costs, grow American jobs, and improve transportation without outrageous tax increases resonates with commonsense voters and hard-working families.

STRONG LABOR SUPPORT

Dan is very proud to welcome endorsements from the following labor unions: Chicago Federation of Labor, AFL-CIO, International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 134, International Union of Operating Engineers Local 150, Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen, American Train Dispatchers Association, Sheet Metal Air Rail Transportation Workers, National Conference of Firemen and Oilers, Brotherhood of Maintenance Way Employes, Will & Grundy Counties Building Trades, Transportation Communications Union, and the Brotherhood of Rail Road Signalmen.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-Newsletter---Unions.jpg]

TEAM LIPINSKI SALUTES CHINESE LUNAR NEW YEAR

A great team of supporters joined Dan under unusually warm and sunny skies at the annual Chinese Lunar New Year Parade in Chicago’s Chinatown community. Thousands of people attended the annual parade which features colorful floats and traditional lion and dragon dances marking the Lunar New Year.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-Newsletter---Chinese.jpg]

LEMONT VILLIAGE OFFICIALS LINE UP FOR LIPINSKI

Dan attended a tremendous meet & greet hosted by Mayor John Egofske at Gelsosomo's Pizzeria in Lemont. He was honored to be endorsed by Mayor Egofski and the entire Lemont Board of Trustees which includes Janelle Kittridge, Ryan Kwasneski, Dave Maher, Ken McClafferty, Rick Sniegowski and Ronald Stapleton. Former mayors Richard Kwasneski and John Piazza also offered their support, recognizing the work Dan has done in the village including helping to create additional Metra lines and improve the I & M Canal Trail.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-Newsletter---Lemont.jpg]

OAK LAWN ELECTED OFFICIALS COME OUT STRONG FOR DAN

Oak Lawn Mayor Sandra Bury and several trustees joined village residents for an open house and get out the vote event in support of Dan’s re-election campaign. Thanks to Mayor Bury and Trustees Tim Desmond (1st), Alex Olejniczak (2nd), Paul Mallo (3rd), Terry Vorderer (4th), Bud Stalker (5th), and Tom Phelan (6th). Dan is proud to have your unified support!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-Newsletter---OakLawn.jpg]

SOUP AND BREAD FUNDRAISER TO SUPPORT THE HOMELESS

Judy and Dan attended the BEDS Plus annual Soup and Bread fundraiser, which bolsters the agency’s efforts to combat homelessness in southwestern Cook County. Local restaurants provided soup for the event and a few microbreweries brought their beer products. Dan thanked the organization’s staff and volunteers for their work to end homelessness one person at a time.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-Newsletter---BEDS.jpg]

JOIN TEAM LIPINSKI!

Grab a sign now for your window or front lawn while they last!! Click here to request a sign [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/volunteer] .

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/SignPost.jpg]

We’re almost there. Thank you for your continued support!

Team Lipinski

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8e6fbd8f-6749-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8/480e2f73-c749-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODBlMmY3My1jNzQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A6ElvTt8Gj2e4uGN8n7VH8H-ikZx2r2Q9tUxuGqR9Ds=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558
United States

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Rallying conservatives across Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
This is a vital effort as we enter the home stretch. Read & respond today >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ba85b76feb8ac8be/ebe1bdb0be82a423c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, This week we hit the road... and we’re likely headed to a town near you! We’ve already made our first few stops. The turnout has been outstanding, and I can tell you this: **Grassroots conservatives are fired up to DEFEAT the swamp insiders on March 3rd!** That’s exactly why I’m running. It’s time to take a stand for our Alabama values, and send President Trump an unwavering conservative ally in the U.S. Senate. Today, I’m asking for your help to keep our bus rolling across Alabama. name: Rita Hart
subject: Listening to every voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VYSiUe0DTiKSalIKnFQ6_A0t0SuN4KCPv27oanBL_I0=/FETkzabnhtD2959TlctjCefmEjVrhj4CAmvtU_oHQHc=) Peter, I recently met with students at Berg Middle School to talk about politics, the importance of voting and how our government works. I also took some time to listen to _them_ , asking what they thought about the most important issues facing our community. **[I take listening to my community seriously, and that means listening to all voices. I want to hear from you now, too. Take my issue survey to let me know what you'd like me to prioritize when I go to Washington.](https://act.myngp.com/el/VYSiUe0DTiKSalIKnFQ6_A0t0SuN4KCPv27oanBL_I0=/FETkzabnhtD2959TlctjCefmEjVrhj4CAmvtU_oHQHc=)** Listening to constituents is so important in a representative democracy. I want to take our collective voices and values with me to Washington, and I don't just want to listen to the people who agree with me 100%. On my recent visit with our bright students, the _Newton Daily News_ wrote: _"... Of the many candidates or elected officials who have visited teacher Tyler Stewart's civics class in the past few years, few have really taken an active interest in the views of kids who are not even legally allowed to vote by asking what they think. Hart remained consistent to that effect."_ **[I've always believed that listening to one another can not only help us fix common problems but help get past division. I want to hear from you too, Peter. Take my survey today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/VYSiUe0DTiKSalIKnFQ6_A0t0SuN4KCPv27oanBL_I0=/FETkzabnhtD2959TlctjCefmEjVrhj4CAmvtU_oHQHc=)** For our future,
Rita Hart __ __ __ __ __ __ | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/VYSiUe0DTiKSalIKnFQ6_A0t0SuN4KCPv27oanBL_I0=/-V-Ruw3UzWrCQxm8Ou-Qx_a9mWaXegx-CvPDRdkKdKM=?refcode=200207-email)******

Wheatland IA 52777 United States__

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I filed an ethics complaint against Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujZ1uTA4b6KicQqgqcMZvFo3Hq_5M38CO5vFqSATImoigi6CgPnAcQ8043Ns1xJJuUZavPKEdxbSqJhw_9sEwdq03rd1iA9FD3RkOUfODxqn4lKIONRBm50QvAat-nSJCuhzMR6cdzxlR6e7B8ZsxsQuuH6aVRGglxNIsuYyiAdXGIi_DLtjGg==&c=8B9tjffljSBGfY6CSIxk5WWqZQNfViwdwcNcVm1AaB5-Gje1MI2PBg==&ch=ESIIWdOhPiYgpDjheTDFW-QlJnPbLqFtcMKuAC4wJ8SfWlQNEg3BEw==)
---
| Patriot,
On Wednesday night I announced that I will file an ethics complaint against Nancy Pelosi for tearing up President Trump's speech after the State of the Union. Her conduct was beneath the dignity of the House, and a potential violation of the law (18 USC 2071).
NOBODY is above the law. She must be held accountable.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujZ1uTA4b6KicQqgqcMZvFo3Hq_5M38CO5vFqSATImoigi6CgPnAcQ8043Ns1xJJuUZavPKEdxbSqJhw_9sEwdq03rd1iA9FD3RkOUfODxqn4lKIONRBm50QvAat-nSJCuhzMR6cdzxlR6e7B8ZsxsQuuH6aVRGglxNIsuYyiAdXGIi_DLtjGg==&c=8B9tjffljSBGfY6CSIxk5WWqZQNfViwdwcNcVm1AaB5-Gje1MI2PBg==&ch=ESIIWdOhPiYgpDjheTDFW-QlJnPbLqFtcMKuAC4wJ8SfWlQNEg3BEw==)
---
| Not only was her behavior a potential crime, but it was also disrespectful, petty, and hateful. She despises President Trump and is upset that the Democrats' impeachment scam failed miserably.
I can't stop Nancy by myself. We need to come together and flip the House so we can remove Pelosi as Speaker.
---
| | | [FLIP THE HOUSE AND REMOVE NANCY AS SPEAKER](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujZ1uTA4b6KicQqgqcMZvFo3Hq_5M38CO5vFqSATImoigi6CgPnAcQ8043Ns1xJJuUZavPKEdxbSqJhw_9sEwdq03rd1iA9FD3RkOUfODxqn4lKIONRBm50QvAat-nSJCuhzMR6cdzxlR6e7B8ZsxsQuuH6aVRGglxNIsuYyiAdXGIi_DLtjGg==&c=8B9tjffljSBGfY6CSIxk5WWqZQNfViwdwcNcVm1AaB5-Gje1MI2PBg==&ch=ESIIWdOhPiYgpDjheTDFW-QlJnPbLqFtcMKuAC4wJ8SfWlQNEg3BEw==)
---
| God bless America,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz

name: Jason Yates
subject: Partisanship over Policies?
body:
Peter,
Earlier this week, President Trump delivered his third State of the Union Address. The address included the administration’s many accomplishments as well as moving stories of the President’s honored guests.
Yet what was particularly interesting was watching the response, or lack thereof, of Democrats during the President’s remarks. The division and partisanship in our government were on full display.
Since our nation’s founding, our governing bodies have always been comprised of a variety of viewpoints. Even our Founding Fathers debated over the new form of government they would create. They certainly did not all agree.
**But, it’s not Congress’s disagreement that caught my attention at the SOTU. Instead, it is the great divide along _partisan lines and not policies_. **
It’s a divide between Republicans and Democrats. Congress displayed an allegiance to their political parties rather than to their moral convictions, faith, and the people they represent. They neglected And that is what strikes me as concerning.
**This is why My Faith Votes exist. We call Christians to rise above the partisan divide. We don’t cling to human-made systems but instead to God’s biblical principles. We stand resolved to put our faith above party allegiance.**
We should have witnessed members from both sides of the political aisle stand in support when President Trump declared,
“Whether we are Republican, Democrat, or Independent, surely we must all agree that every human life is a sacred gift from God!”
And when he said,
“My Administration is also defending religious liberty, and that includes the Constitutional right to pray in public schools. In America, we do not punish prayer. We do not tear down crosses. We do not ban symbols of faith. We do not muzzle preachers and pastors. In America, we celebrate faith. We cherish religion. We lift our voices in prayer, and we raise our sights to the Glory of God!”
On Tuesday night, it was clear that Congress allowed their political party to define their values.
Our society would like to do the same with us; label you as an “R” or a “D”. And while you may be registered with one of those political parties, they do not define your values. Your faith defines your values and your faith informs your vote. That’s the crucial difference.
I so appreciate the fact that you put your faith above all else. Please know that you are not standing alone. We’re standing with you, and together, we have the opportunity to reach millions more Christians to stand united on the truth of God’s Word.
If we activate Christians to pray fervently for our nation, think biblically and vote in the 100,000 elections across the country this year, the result will be peace and prosperity in our communities and freedom that continues for generations.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200207apl01nd&n=1)
P.S. You can help activate non-voting Christians by **[donating to our voter mobilization effort](http://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200131apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200207apl01nd&n=2)**. Help others bring the values of their faith to the polls in November 2020. Now is the time for Christians to unite in one powerful voice and influence the elections with our faith.
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200207apl01nd&n=3).

name: MJ Hegar Battleground HQ
subject: The path to a new Senate that works for all Texans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
All eyes will be on Texas during this election.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef0401e/3722894236/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

**All eyes will be on Texas during this election.** That fact is clear as we count down the days to the start of early voting in the primary on February 18th (only 11 more days!). **[Will you rush a donation today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef0401d/3722894236/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Here's the deal: _The Dallas Morning News_ wrote that "the most-watched race in Texas will be the Senate battle," and we're gearing up for a hard fight. We know that Senator John Cornyn is already pouring money into this race -- and he has a nearly $12 million war chest heavily funded by special interest donors.

**Donate now to win this Senate seat and elect MJ to fight for us in a Senate that works for Texans.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef0401c/3722894236/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef04013/3722894236/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef04012/3722894236/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef04011/3722894236/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef04010/3722894236/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__")**
We need a new Senate to make any real progress. **And the path to a Senate that prioritizes the people over special interests and corporate PACs runs straight through Texas.**

MJ's not taking money from corporate PACs, because she answers to Texans, not the special interests. So if you believe in a new kind of Senate -- one that serves the people, not the special interests -- we absolutely have to get MJ elected. And that starts with the support of folks like you.

**[Pitch in $3 to elect MJ and build a Senate that serves the people, not the special interests.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef04017/3722894236/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__&amount=3&recurring=true")**

Thanks,

Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489043b/7f51f7bc/4d03052c/4ef0401d/3722894236/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.2nd__877__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: HUGE NEWS: First poll out!
body:
We just completed our first snap poll of voters in my district and I think you’re going to be amazed with the results.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363427-851187-4855382-95d7a18e88-7086b7326c)
Patriot,

We just completed our first snap poll of voters in my district and I think you’re going to be amazed with the results.

I can’t say I’m surprised, but I’m thrilled to be validated.

**You can feel it in the air around the nation.**

There are two types of people in America, those filled with hate toward President Trump and those filled with optimism over the state of our Union.

**Optimism is winning!**

We collected hundreds of data points in our poll, and I wanted to share this data set directly with you.

Here you go:

We randomly sampled registered voters in the District and what this means is that based upon voter turnout similar to the 2016 Election . . .

**. . . Democrat Lois Frankel would get 41% of the vote and I would receive 47%.**
That leaves an undecided margin of 12%, but given Lois Frankel’s negatives from this poll, she is going to have to do the image makeover of the century to win over undecided voters.

But let’s not give her the opportunity, [**donate to start our ad campaign today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363427-851187-4855382-95d7a18e88-7086b7326c).

[**We need to raise an additional $10,000 within the next week to get my name and story in front of those voters who don’t know who I am.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363427-851187-4855382-95d7a18e88-7086b7326c)

All but 6.5% of voters were familiar with four-term Congresswoman Lazy Lois Frankel but that’s not good for her.

**Frankel has a 69% negative opinion rating from voters in our district. Wow!**

When asked about me, 47% held a positive opinion with 29% not knowing who I am. I’ll take that!

So we have to put in the work to get my name and my story in front of those voters!

[**Can you pitch in today?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363427-851187-4855382-95d7a18e88-7086b7326c)

Right now, we’re producing ads to deliver to specific voters in the district and the earlier we start, **the bigger army we’re going to build**.

Every dollar helps. [**A $25 donation helps place an ad in front of 1,000 voters, so please give whatever you can.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363427-851187-4855382-95d7a18e88-7086b7326c)

After each ad campaign, we’ll be running a new poll, so if you can help cover those costs as well, I would GREATLY appreciate it.

We’re able to do polling at a VERY low cost and I’ll be sharing our methods with other Republican candidates so we can all benefit from the machine that the Laura Loomer for Congress campaign is putting together to win back President Trump’s voting district.

Thanks again for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. So many people said this race is unwinnable. The truth is that Lois Frankel has never faced a competitor like me, and **she’s never faced an army of conservatives like US**. [**If you haven’t already done so, please help fund our first campaign ads today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363427-851187-4855382-95d7a18e88-7086b7326c).

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-363427-851187-84585d41bbe610b-7086b7326c)

---

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Doug Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team --
Earlier this week, despite his status as arguably 2020's most vulnerable Democrat, Senator Doug Jones showed true integrity and commitment to the constitution and voted to convict Donald Trump.
Doug represents a state the tends to vote for Republicans, and Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are already attacking him for his vote. He could really use your help to fight back.
[**We 're hoping to raise $25,000 for Doug today to help him take on Mitch McConnell's attacks. Will you please help protect this incredibly vulnerable Democratic seat by donating $3 or more?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4a3/2a380d31/22843cec/f0f5d0/4008034899/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIwN19NV0g0Sm9uZXMtMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20200207_MWH4Jones-2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
The stakes are historically high, but to Mitch McConnell and his enablers in Washington, no tactics are off-limits.
But that's not how Doug operates. He'll continue working hard in the Senate for what's right -- defending our health care, civil rights, and equality -- but he can't do it without you, everyone.
[**If you care about keeping courageous voices who will fight for what's right for the country -- not what's right for Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump -- pitch in $3 to stand with Doug today.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4a3/2a380d31/22843cec/f0f5d0/4008034899/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIwN19NV0g0Sm9uZXMtMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20200207_MWH4Jones-2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks for getting involved. This is so important.
-- Maggie's campaign staff

name: Warren HQ
subject: Elizabeth runs her campaign differently because she knows it's long past due to get big money out of politics -- but that means she needs your help to reach this goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Right now, our campaign is being outspent in advertising in New Hampshire -- and Elizabeth needs your help to reach our $2 million goal and close the gap before Tuesday's primary. So we're asking... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852addf/45c30650/1fb682011/66e26483/3880057359/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're in the middle of a competitive primary. Winning this nomination and going on to defeat Donald Trump is going to take a lot of work -- and strong grassroots support.

**But there's something different about how Elizabeth raises money for this campaign.** Unlike some of her opponents, she doesn't:
1. Fundraise by inviting billionaires to hang out with her in highrise penthouses in New York City or mansions in Los Angeles in exchange for large donations.
2. Have a Super PAC to prop up her advertising program.
3. Spend hours on the phone calling up mega-wealthy donors asking for big checks in exchange for some one-on-one time.

**Elizabeth runs her campaign differently because she knows it's long past due to get big money out of politics.** That's why there's only _one_ way we're raising money on this campaign, and it's with the help of grassroots supporters like you.

**But right now, our campaign is being outspent in advertising in New Hampshire -- and Elizabeth needs your help to reach our $2 million goal and close the gap before Tuesday's primary. So we're asking:**

**[Can you chip in for the first time right now to help hit this important goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852addf/45c30650/1fb682011/66e26488/3880057359/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8yOEZfRUdMX05GRl9RXzIwMjAwMjA3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO28F_EGL_NFF_Q_20200207_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Right now, our campaign is being outspent in advertising in New Hampshire -- and Elizabeth needs your help to reach our $2 million goal and close the gap before Tuesday's primary. So we're asking... | | | "" We're in the middle of a competitive primary. Winning this nomination and going on to defeat Donald Trump is going to take a lot of work -- and strong grassroots support. But there's something different about how Elizabeth raises money for this campaign. Unlike some of her opponents, she doesn't: 1. Fundraise by inviting billionaires to hang out with her in highrise penthouses in New York City or mansions in Los Angeles in exchange for large donations. 2. Have a Super PAC to prop up her advertising program. 3. Spend hours on the phone calling up mega-wealthy donors asking for big checks in exchange for some one-on-one time. Elizabeth runs her campaign differently because she knows it's long past due to get big money out of politics. That's why there's only one way we're raising money on this campaign, and it's with the help of grassroots supporters like you. But right now, our campaign is being outspent in advertising in New Hampshire -- and Elizabeth needs your help to reach our $2 million goal and close the gap before Tuesday's primary. So we're asking: "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Bennet 2020 Organizing Team
subject: here's how YOU power this campaign →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hey folks,

This is Jason Colella, field director here in New Hampshire, writing to you from our HQ in Nashua. [ I'm going to ask you to make a contribution in a moment, but first let me explain why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afe/3106993339/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We've only got four more days until voting begins, and they will have more of an impact on this race than the months of punditry and speculation before this.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afe/3106993339/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Earlier this week our national finance director explained that we need to raise $100,000 before voting begins to fund our final outreach efforts, [and we want to explain exactly how your contributions will be used:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afe/3106993339/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

* Buying clipboards for the canvassers out knocking doors
* Airing our ads during these last crucial days
* Printing literature to distribute
* Ordering yard signs to display
* And (maybe most importantly) coffee to keep us going!

[So, what do you say, team? Can the New Hampshire team count on you to make your first donation of $5 - or whatever you can afford? It would really mean a lot to us >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afe/3106993339/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 VOLUNTEERS' COFFEE >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afd/3106993339/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $10 FOR CLIPBOARDS >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afc/3106993339/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $15 FOR CAMPAIGN MATERIALS >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973af3/3106993339/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,29,15,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $25 FOR YARD SIGNS >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973af2/3106993339/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
You've probably heard that a record number of voters are undecided this close to election day, and _that 's absolutely true._

When I've been knocking doors, I've heard that people are dissatisfied with the state of the race and the rest of the candidates running.

[And even though Michael might not be a celebrity politician, the more voters hear about him, the more they like him!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afe/3106993339/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I know you get a lot of fundraising emails from us, but this is absolutely crucial, team.

[We're in the final stretch until voting begins, and we need all the support we can get.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afe/3106993339/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Can the New Hampshire team count on you, team? You can fuel this campaign to victory! >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa9e/134673f2/37d3b668/69973afe/3106993339/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Chris Putnam
subject: Have you RSVP’d for tonight's FREE concert yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, I just want to check in real quick and make sure you have a ticket for tonight's event! **We 're only a matter of hours away and [spots are filling up fast. ](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/9idjOMxMt2aVYowfA892w3LQ/a7d892BOyVBL5PjQl892ndk2bw)** **Tonight, I will be joined by the legendary musician, Rich O 'Toole, as we celebrate our right to bears arms! ** [**You still have time to RSVP**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/9idjOMxMt2aVYowfA892w3LQ/a7d892BOyVBL5PjQl892ndk2bw)and reserve your tickets for an exciting night! [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/892OuGK892892nCPA763lQpDEavQwg/a7d892BOyVBL5PjQl892ndk2bw) As we embark on the final stretch toward the Texas Primary on March 3rd, I'm excited to meet as many folks across our district as possible. [**Tonight 's event is completely free to attend and I encourage you to bring your friends and family along! **](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/9idjOMxMt2aVYowfA892w3LQ/a7d892BOyVBL5PjQl892ndk2bw) **I hope to see you tonight, friend! **
\- Chris
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/Kj1Q8p7pXgWYwIqG3xrB1Q/a7d892BOyVBL5PjQl892ndk2bw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/5h892RcKh1j9yrC3DcePAXiQ/a7d892BOyVBL5PjQl892ndk2bw)
* * *

name: Team Scholten
subject: This is personal for J.D.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Hi Peter,

We wanted to check in to see if you had received our farming petition.

Protecting our farmers is personal to J.D. -- it’s the reason he came home to Iowa and ran for office.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14754686/154997192/1732318578?ms=em20_200207_farmerspt&refcode=em20_200207_farmerspt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDQ2OWFkNS1lYzQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HOdQlEKxgGu-6flUXK0T0my34KsKwk_nKiwQKNzxPk=&emci=dfda293f-7a47-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=dd469ad5-ec49-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6658013)

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Here's what Susan Collins emailed to her supporters after her vote to acquit President Trump:
body:
This email will make you angry...

Friends,
Susan Collins sent an email to her supporters defending her vote to acquit President Trump without witness testimony.
You have to read it for yourself -- it really is something! Check it out below, and when you're done, chip in at this link to defeat Senator Collins:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/BeatCollins](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802931/4bef7a87/6d4774bb/287fbcb5/3621002356/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200207-1-full")**
\- Team Sara
_\----Read Collins ' Email below---_
From: Susan Collins <info@susancollins.com>
Subject: My vote to acquit President Trump
Moments ago, I voted to acquit President Trump.
The criticism from my political opponents has been swift and harsh. Part of that might just be that they are mad that I refused to give into their attempts to pressure me. I also believe that the partisan origins of this proceeding -- impeachment passed the House without a single Republican vote -- was an indication of some of the weaknesses of their case.
My opponents also don't seem to share my faith in the voters when it comes to deciding who our elected officials should be. It was important for me to take my oath to do impartial justice seriously. I listened closely, I took extensive notes, and I asked questions of both sides. Ultimately, I concluded that the House Managers failed to prove their case. Here is a brief excerpt from the conclusion of my speech:
_It has been 230 years since George Washington first took the oath of office, and there are good reasons why during that entire time the Senate has never removed a President. Such a move would not only affect the sitting President but could have unpredictable and potentially adverse consequences for public confidence in our electoral process._
_It is my view that, except when extraordinary circumstances require a different result, we should entrust to the people the most fundamental decision of a democracy, namely, who should lead their country._
Friend, I am so grateful to have your support and friendship during this difficult process. **Now that this is over, it is time for the Congress to get back to work on the problems that are facing our great country.**
Thank you for letting me share my views.
Sincerely,
Senator Susan Collins
**Are you "disappointed" in Senator Collins' vote to acquit Trump?**
**[Then chip in to defeat her and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802931/4bef7a87/6d4774bb/287fbcb5/3621002356/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200207-1-full")**
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802931/4bef7a87/6d4774bb/287fbcb5/3621002356/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200207-1-full")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802931/4bef7a87/6d4774bb/287fbcb4/3621002356/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802931/4bef7a87/6d4774bb/287fbc8b/3621002356/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802931/4bef7a87/6d4774bb/287fbc8a/3621002356/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: We're running out of time.
body:
Good morning Peter,
We're running out of time.

Early voting starts February 18th, which is less than two weeks away. Despite our small staff and shoestring budget, we have been to every corner of the district, talking to voters about my issues.

But,

There are still hundreds of people I haven't yet reached, by mailer, phone, advertisement, or block walk.

What does this mean?
So many people vote for Congresswoman Jackson Lee because they don't know there is a viable alternative. I believe I have the vision and policies to make a difference for the better, but I need your help to communicate it to those I haven't reached yet.

What it comes down to...
At the end of the day, every campaign needs to raise funds to pay for community outreach. I have tried to focus on voter engagement, and have thus dedicated my time and energy to being in the community, and talking to voters face to face. With time running out, this simply won't cut it any more.

If you donate $20 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927) right now, I can put out an advertisement that will reach 1,000 new voters. When you donate $50 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927) , we can print and mail nearly 200 mailers.

The fact of the matter is, I cannot do this without you.
Donate $20 (http://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927)
http://marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927
You can also sign up to be a volunteer (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927) to help me communicate my position to voters. Every little bit of help counts, so even if it's just once, it can make all the difference.
Become a Volunteer (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927)
https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/news/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927
In the News
I am proud of the traction we have gained over the last few weeks, and our hard work is paying off. The article above is just one of several covering the campaign, and discussing our issues. Click here (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/news/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927) to read the latest.
Contribute Here (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0a303bfd9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_06_10_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0a303bfd9f-32267927)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Our path forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7178%2E377263%2E6b5A3u) Yang Gang --

I’m a numbers guy, that’s why I have to be frank with you right now.

It’s been a tough week and it’s now or never. Looking at the polls we have to push now to have a chance to finish in the top 4 in New Hampshire and give our campaign the boost it needs.

We thought after Iowa we would see a big bump in fundraising and support. But even though we finished better than the polls expected, the confusion and failure to see results for days has hurt our narrative and our fundraising.

**[We’re going all-in over the next few days with our resources, staff, and time for a top finish in New Hampshire -- and setting a fundraising goal of $2 million by the night before the primary, February 10. Will you give $10 or more now so I can go all-in and contend for the top 4 here?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24808?t=5&akid=7178%2E377263%2E6b5A3u)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24808?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7178%2E377263%2E6b5A3u)
